Hey, what's up, it's Rock and Roll. Lead Nurture is everything that happens between the opt-in and get them actually on the phone. So either one of those situations. But the mind scheduler, so that takes a lot of the work out, believe it or not, in the beginning for the first four years I did this, I didn't have my mind scheduler, so we had to manually reach out to everyone. And so the subject of underneath that would be to get them to pick up first and then get them to pick a time. And that's for somebody who opted in and then get them to pick up and confirm the time. So if they did pick a time on the online scheduler, we still need to treat them as though they are not going to show up because I'm telling you, they will not. Unless they confirm the time and they have built a little bit of rapport and they have a desire to show up. Otherwise, it's somebody who is very low likelihood of actually appearing. So you need to treat leads that have scheduled leads that have not scheduled the same, except with the schedule, you're just confirming that time and getting them excited about showing up. Okay, so for this process, I'll be going over the calling and texting sequence, the phone script and the text scripts that we use throughout the process. The second objective is to get them to show. So once we have them scheduled, we have them with a time that's confirmed, we want to increase the likelihood that they show up. And so we'll be showing you the reminder sequence that we use, that we've tested that has shown the best results for the gyms that we have worked with to get prospects to show. The third thing we're going to do is after we have sort of skim the cream off the top, so to say, the last thing we do is we run all of the leaping. So we basically blast the list one more time. And I do this on a periodic basis, usually every like 14 days or so. We will run a last push just saying, hey, like, must have missed you, maybe life got in the way. You know, when do you like, just shoot me a message if you want, and I'll show you this hopefully one last go at getting them. And I will tell you that last push always pays for itself. We always get sales from that. So I highly, highly, highly recommend you do it. So that is the lead nurture overview.
